title: Erdős hub stub (Tier 1)
description: One machine-readable record per Erdős problem, keyed on the canonical erdosproblems.com integer. Generated by tools/build_stubs.py from Apache-2.0 sources only; NEVER carries prose copied from erdosproblems.com. A stub is the agent-coordination annex to Thomas Bloom's canonical human index, not a mirror of it.

id.description: canonical key = erdosproblems.com/N = teorth number = Lean filename N

canonical_source.description: attribution pointer; the hub links, it does not own the prose

prize.description: historical Erdős prize from teorth; display history, NOT a finite-computation payout trigger

statement_source.description: lean = informal statement from an Apache-2.0 Lean docstring; link = prose stays at erdos_url (never copied)

statement.description: MUST be null when statement_source=link (enforced in the compiler)

deep_ref.description: join to the Tier-2 audited record when promoted

p42_slug.description: bridge to a packaged P42 bounty
